# Frontend

  

## 🎨 Design Tools:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Color](https://www.nerdfonts.com/font-downloads)- A resource for downloading Nerd Fonts, which are patched fonts for developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Penpot](https://penpot.app/)- An open-source design and prototyping platform that allows for collaborative work.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Blueprint](https://blueprintjs.com/)- A React-based UI toolkit for building complex, data-dense interfaces.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Balsamiq](https://balsamiq.com/)- A rapid wireframing tool that helps you create mockups quickly and easily.

  

- [Flex](https://flexboxfroggy.com/)- An interactive game for learning CSS Flexbox.

  

## 💻 Development Resources:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Vue.js](https://vuejs.org/)- A progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [GitHub - dypsilon/frontend-dev-bookmarks](https://github.com/dypsilon/frontend-dev-bookmarks)- A comprehensive list of bookmarks for frontend developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Evergreen Documentation](https://evergreen.segment.com/components/alert)- Documentation for Evergreen, a React UI framework for building ambitious projects.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [How to Setup Iconic Font Aggregator](https://www.nerdfonts.com/font-downloads)- Guide on setting up Nerd Fonts for iconic font aggregation.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Create Next App](https://create-next-app.vercel.app/)- A tool to bootstrap a Next.js application quickly.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Flowbite](https://flowbite.com/)- An open-source library of UI components built with Tailwind CSS.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [StepZen Documentation](https://us-east-a.dashboard.ibm.stepzen.com/getting-started)- Getting started guide for StepZen, a GraphQL API development tool.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [GraphQL PHP Schema Definition](https://webonyx.github.io/graphql-php/schema-definition/)- Documentation on defining schemas in GraphQL using PHP.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Shadcn for Vue](https://www.shadcn-vue.com/)- A component library for Vue.js, designed for building beautiful UIs.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Tailbits Component Library](https://tailwind-generator.com/generators?ref=dailydev)- A collection of customizable Tailwind CSS components.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Formik](https://formik.org/)- A form library for React that helps with managing form state and validation.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Next.js Material-UI Integration](https://mui.com/material-ui/integrations/nextjs/)- Guide on integrating Material-UI with Next.js applications.

  

## 🎞️ Animation Libraries:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [anime.js](https://animejs.com/)- A lightweight JavaScript animation library with a simple API.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Chart.js](https://www.chartjs.org/)- A JavaScript library for creating interactive charts and graphs.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Loader Animations](https://uiball.com/loaders/)- A collection of CSS loader animations for web projects.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Driver.js](https://driverjs.com/)- A lightweight, powerful, and flexible library for driving users focus across the page.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Flickity](https://flickity.metafizzy.co/)- A touch-friendly, responsive carousel library.

  

- [Scroll Animations](https://scrollrevealjs.org/)- A library for creating scroll animations on web pages.

  

## 🆓 Free Resources:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Free Illustrations](https://undraw.co/illustrations)- A collection of free, open-source illustrations for any project.

  

- [Free Icons](https://iconmonstr.com/)- A large collection of free simple icons for your next project.

  

- [Free Fonts](https://fonts.google.com/)- Google Fonts offers a wide variety of free, open-source fonts.

  

## 📚 Other Resources:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Dribbble](https://dribbble.com/)- A community of designers sharing their work, process, and projects.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Bootstrapr](https://bootstrapr.com/)- A collection of free Bootstrap themes and templates.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [cdnjs](https://cdnjs.com/)- A free content delivery network for JavaScript libraries.

  

- [Choosing Colors](https://color.adobe.com/create/color-wheel)- A tool for choosing color schemes and exploring color combinations.
